name: Pineapple Salsa Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cucumber, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 Jalapeno pepper, seeded and finely chopped
1 Bell pepper, yellow, cored, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine pineapple chunks, cucumbers, scallions, and jalapenos. Process until smooth.
2. Add yellow peppers and process in on/off motions until finely chopped.
3. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in pineapple juice, lime juice, sugar, and salt.
4. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least one hour. The soup can be stored, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 8 hours.
5. Makes about 5 cups. Serves 6.
